summary: GashaBits refactor verification (frontend-only). All 12 requested behaviors validated end-to-end on the deployed preview URL. Branding text correct (GASHABITS title, exact subtitle/footer/topper). Corrected flow verified: simulate-payment -> PROCESSING -> auto VERIFIED -> auto machine shake + lever rotates 180deg (is-turned) + prize-capsule drops into tray, with sprite-canvas/category/label/palette/download-button REMAINING HIDDEN at DROPPED stage. Manual early lever pull during ~1s VERIFIED window also triggers dispense. Tapping capsule reveals sprite (canvas 384x384 render of 32x32 sprite). Anti-screenshot overlays watermark-grid and watermark-text ('UNMINTED') are visible on top of canvas with pointer-events:none. Download initiates PNG file 'gashabits-rpg-item-031b87d4.png' with no JS errors. play-again resets to IDLE. sessionStorage 'gasha_session_v1' persists and reload restores the exact same sprite (determinism confirmed: 'Hero Blade' matched pre/post reload). Responsive: mobile 390px column stacking with no horizontal scroll; desktop 1440px row layout. Only non-app console errors were expected 400/430 from real explorer network polling (acceptable per spec).
critical_code_review_comments:
Subtitle

lacks data-testid='app-subtitle'. Text is correct ('The Traceless 8-Bit Vending Machine') but not queryable by testid. Non-blocking, but consider adding for future automation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All refactor behaviors verified passing on preview URL. Full flow timing: sim-payment click -> ~1.6s processing -> VERIFIED banner -> +1s auto dispense (shake + lever is-turned + capsule) -> tap capsule to reveal. Manual lever pull works during the 1s verified window. Watermark overlays are DOM (pointer-events:none), download uses fresh offscreen canvas so PNG has no watermark baked in.
